title: lyonia calyculata f. crispa
intro: Lyonia calyculata f. crispa, also known as the curly-stemmed or crinkled-fruited lyonia, is a shrub species within the Lyonia genus of the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant's medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its leaves and stems, which have been used in traditional herbal medicine for various purposes. Lyonia calyculata f. crispa has been valued for its expectorant and diuretic properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and relieve water retention. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote health benefits like reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system.
